subject: Fix persistent volume to be mapped to Release.Name
commit_message:
Fix persistent volume to be mapped to Release.Name

Change-Id: I98754174e50537df2e82a9d9b40f471edff19e69
Issue-ID: OOM-907
Signed-off-by: BorislavG <Borislav.Glozman@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 2:

There is still more:

Example:
aai/charts/aai-elasticsearch/templates/deployment.yaml
  hostPath:
          path: {{ .Values.persistence.mountPath }}/{{ include "common.namespace" . }}/{{ .Values.persistence.mountSubPath }}
